error.signature: org.apache.kafka.common.errors.RecordTooLargeException: The message is 1500000 bytes, max is 1048576

verdict.summary: Message exceeds size limit. Default is 1MB. Must increase on broker, topic, AND producer side.

dead_ends.action: Only increase max.message.bytes on the broker
dead_ends.why_fails: Must also increase on topic level AND producer (max.request.size). All three must agree.
Broker will still reject messages exceeding its message.max.bytes setting

workarounds.action: Increase limits on all three levels: broker, topic, and producer
workarounds.how: Broker: message.max.bytes=5242880; Topic: max.message.bytes=5242880; Producer: max.request.size=5242880

workarounds.action: Compress messages to stay within limits
workarounds.how: Producer config: compression.type=snappy  # or lz4, zstd

workarounds.action: Redesign to use chunking or external storage for large payloads
workarounds.how: Store large data in S3/blob storage; send only reference in Kafka message
